name: callcontext::FromHandle
title: callcontext::FromHandle
description: Retrieves a call context from a permanent handle. You need a permanent handle if you want to keep a call alive for a longer time, e.g. if you wish to store several call contexts in a (associative) array. You also need a permanent handle if you want to pass the call context e.g. to a CAPL DLL.
You need to call callcontext::ReleaseHandle if you do not need the call context any more so that its resources are freed.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: A permanent handle for a call context.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
